article.title: Uber L4, L5 round
article.content:
Hello All,

I have not interviewed in last 5 years but I am looking for a change and through internal referrel I got a request for **Business (Technical) Phone Screen to Assess Coding + Design & Architecture Competencies (Online | 60 mins)**.

I am curious if anyone has recently cleared the interview. The main thing I am interested in strategizing. I have 8 days before this round comes up. My background has always been in front-end domain. I have been part of small to mid size company. I understand DSA is very important but given that I have 8 days I wont be able to solve 100+ problems. 

If you can share what strategy helped with tight deadline, i will really appriciate it.

post.content: Hey OP, how did your round go ? Can we connect, I also have an interview scheduled and in the same situation ?
Hi OP!,\nI have also interview scheduled. We can connect. \nhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/santosh-yadav-79bb1779
